title: Beyond Sabarimala: Kerala’s Hidden Temple Gems! 🛕✨
description:
Kerala isn’t just about Sabarimala! Discover Padmanabhaswamy’s riches, Guruvayur’s divinity, Vadakkunnathan’s ancient vibes, and more iconic temples like Attukal’s record-breaking Pongala & Ambalapuzha’s famous Palpayasam.
Which Kerala temple is your favorite? Comment below! 👇
